rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARNOLD S GRIDLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion In Support Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees Pursant To Ccp Sec. 685.040
rulings.Rulings: The motion is continued to 6/20/2013 at 3:00 p.m. for the moving party to addrss the following in a supplemental declaration filed by 6/6/2013: (1) of the $68,400 fees claimed, what is the amount of fees actually billed taking into consideration any reduction by counsel; (2) what is the total amount of fees billed relating to attempts to add a co-trustee in the Contra Costa action; (3) should the Court reduce the fee award by the $1,000 awarded 1/31/2012, $12,971.90 awarded 5/8/2012, and $1,536 awarded 8/1/2012;(4) provide further information regarding the entries noted by Mr. Cherubin which lack detail. Opposing parties may file a response by 6/13/2013.
